title: Set connect column with API
excerpt: Want to be able to set the connect board via API. I create boards from a template and my connect boards reference the original template NOT the new board i want to connect to and the only option is to manually go in unli…

posts.author: jpelrman87 (Josh Perlman)
posts.cookedHtml: Want to be able to set the connect board via API. I create boards from a template and my connect boards reference the original template NOT the new board i want to connect to and the only option is to manually go in unlink and relink. Ideally we set it by board ID via API.
